what: 2 - Compute linear model on Standard Curves
title: abs-to-conc
text: lm_std_curve() computes per-curve linear regression 2 columns input data lm(abs_corrected ~ 0 + std_conc, data = curve) linear model constraints curve go origin. lm_std_curve() returns table containing one row per standard curve, series information characterizing performance linear model curve (see also ?lm_std_curve(). lm_std_curve() defines curve based groups (dplyr::group_by()) input data (std_corrected example ). Additionally columns abs_corrected std_conc (numeric), function also requires column unique_curve_id. function suspicious_lm() extracts lm_table` produced plates linear model optimal, .e., either p-value model 0.05, residuals normally distributed, heteroscedasticity residuals. lm_table_suspicious can serve identification outliers visual aid (useful larger data sets, plot_list_lm() creates list plots curve given argument (: suspicious lm’s). Calling individual plots can help spotting possible outlier wells, can removed similar steps shown .  numerous suspicious curves, can take advantage package patchwork` display multiple plots (example hereunder whole lm_table)  point, may want remove obvious outlier wells. Follow steps shown vignettes prerequisites remove_wells(). Let’s say want remove well E12 plate NO3_1F1 dataset Nmin: now , longer use std_corrected, std_corrected_wash1. recommend always running one round quality check cleaned datasets approving regression equations. monstrously wrong wells removed single curves, case several curves pipetted per 96-well plate, still need perform per-dilution average absorbance. Indeed, 2 events pipetting dilution, rather 2 successive dilutions. WARNING next step computes per plate per row means standard curves. wells swapped plates, may cause problems. Make sure pipetting issue, correct raw data solve code std_dilution_average() creates artificial “column 13”. can now rerun linear model cleaned (required) per-dilution averaged, repeating steps : computation linear model, identification suspicious curves plotting Good news, suspicious linear models anymore. , one round QC described can still helpful (plot_list_lm()). Let’s store last correction clean variable name reduce possible confusion, let’s compute plots big list, storage purposes. export one output data single list readr::write_rds()`. title: Tidying plate data (verticalization) — verticalize_plates
text: verticalize_plates brings plate data (absorbance mapping data) vertical, tidy format. starts tibble plate format (rendered txt_to_tibble(), csv_to_tibble() skanit_to_tibble()), ends tidy tibble 96 rows (row per well) one column per plate, well structural columns allowing well identification (row, column)

title: Tidying plate data (verticalization) — verticalize_plates
code: verticalize_plates(tibble, coerce_numeric = FALSE, prefix = NULL)

title: Tidying plate data (verticalization) — verticalize_plates
text: tibble tibble containing raw plate-formatted data tidied. tibble must fit following criteria: - Plate ids single capital letter (e.g., "", "B", ...) - Plates must complete (96 wells accounted , set 12 columns x 8 rows), may contain NA's - Plate data tibble must structured exactly example files (see also txt_to_tibble(), csv_to_tibble() skanit_to_tibble()). coerce_numeric Whether force data entries numerical. default set FALSE, data outputted strings prefix Defaults empty string. prefix can added column names, can useful join tables distinct datasets
